data.title: Better Announces First Conversational Credit Decision Engine in ChatGPT with OpenAI
data.description: In New York, Better.com (NASDAQ: BETR) unveiled the first conversational credit decision engine for mortgages and home equity loans in ChatGPT with OpenAI. This innovative app allows users to access Better's Tinman® engine through ChatGPT for streamlined information, enabling lending teams to approve loans quicker and provide cost savings to borrowers. By leveraging this technology, Better aims to enhance its Tinman AI Platform.

data.title: Tenaya Therapeutics Stock Jumps After New Alnylam Deal
data.description: Shares of Tenaya Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: TNYA ) saw an increase as a result of a research collaboration agreement with Alnylam Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: ALNY ). The partnership aims to identify genetic targets for cardiovascular disease treatments, with Tenaya validating up to 15 gene targets. In return, Tenaya will receive $10 million upfront and could potentially earn milestone payments totaling up to $1.13 billion. Tenaya utilizes human-induced pluripotent stem cell-derived cardiomyocytes for target identification and human-engineered heart tissue for product candidate validation. These capabilities have contributed to the positive market response to the company's latest collaboration.

data.title: Thousands of Public High School Seniors Get Expanded Access to Higher Education through NC College Connect
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina, as of March 5, 2026, over 23,000 seniors from public high schools have confirmed their enrollment directly to colleges and universities in North Carolina under the NC College Connect initiative. From August 2025 to January 2026, these students collectively accepted over 88,000 admission offers.

data.title: Framework by LangChain increases AI coding agent success to 82% from 9% without skills. Key for developers.
data.description: LangChain has introduced a new evaluation framework focusing on assessing the skills of AI coding agents. According to the data, the agents exhibited an impressive 82% task completion rate when equipped with the skills evaluated in the framework, in contrast to a mere 9% completion rate without these specific skills. This framework is considered essential for developers creating agent tools, providing them with key benchmarks to improve the performance of AI coding agents.

data.title: MSIG USA Raises more than $525,000 for St. Jude Children's Research Hospital® Through Nationwide Employee and Community Campaigns
data.description: On March 5, 2026, MSIG USA shared that it successfully gathered $525,466 for St. Jude Children's Research Hospital®. This amount was achieved from their involvement in the St. Jude Thanks and Giving® campaign, along with the Climb Mt. Fuji for St. Jude fundraising initiative driven by their employees.

data.title: Capstone Companies, Inc. obtains Working Capital Loan for $250,000 under Unsecured Promissory Note
data.description: In Deerfield Beach, Florida, the Board of Directors of Capstone Companies, Inc., a Florida corporation (OTCQB: CAPC), is dedicated to improving shareholder value. They frequently review potential strategic, financial, and operational options as part of their ongoing effort to implement their strategic business development plan. The plan aims to identify a business line with prospects for growth and profitability. In terms of working capital funding, the Company received a significant amount on March 4, 2026.

data.title: Sling Aircraft North America Partners with Tango Flight to Deliver Sling 2 Aircraft Kits to High Schools Nationwide
data.description: In Torrance, California on March 5, 2026, Tango Flight revealed a recent collaboration with Sling Aircraft North America. Through this partnership, they aim to supply Sling 2 kit aircraft to numerous high schools throughout the United States. This initiative is set to enhance aviation education for students by offering more hands-on opportunities. The objective behind this collaboration is to bolster practical learning experiences and promote the advancement of aviation education among youth.
